title: lingxiaoyu
description: This mod is about the fairyland of ancient Chinese culture. This mod adds a weapon, a prop, two bosses and their summons, made using MCreator.
body: This mod is about the fairyland of ancient Chinese culture. This mod adds a weapon, a prop, two bosses and their summons, made using MCreator, interesting modules, you can join the server and explore with your friends, with strong Chinese elements. This mod is about the fairyland of ancient Chinese culture. This mod adds a weapon, a prop, two bosses and their summons, made using MCreator, you can explore the new armors, fight with new bosses, to get good gameplay. Among them are the props XianYun: give floating effect after right clicking, the weapon "Fan": 20 points of damage and right click to extinguish fire, a new set of equipment ShenLang equipment, which can speed up walking speed and immunity to fire, and finally there are two bosses, one called XianYuanGui will actively attack you and give you blindness effect, and the other needs you to summon it, it's the The ruler of China's heaven, it's gonna use thunder to attack you and defeat it to pass the mod.
